arts.ttl: Tottenham star Pedro Porro fires Arsenal warning after unprompted set-piece admission
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs ARSENAL: Pedro Porro claims Spurs are out to avenge April's devastating 3-2 defeat at the hands of the Gunners after Ange Postecoglou's side lost grip on Champions League qualification last season

arts.ttl: David Pleat could have been England manager until a tabloid sex worker sting saw him sacked by Tottenham... in his new book he tells the full story: 'I felt swallowed up by the shame of lurid, untrue allegations'
arts.sum: INTERVIEW BY MATT BARLOW: One of the delights of listening to David Pleat talk football is that there is no telling where any given storyline might travel.
